items.name_cn:
Black Lambskin
woc Small Envelope Bag. When it comes to envelope bags, this one from Y must be mentioned! Made entirely of Italian lambskin, it features a structured shape and a comfortable touch! The detachable shoulder strap adds versatility; remove it to use as a clutch or evening bag. It has multiple card slots, making it incredibly practical. Carry your phone and cards, and this small bag is all you need for your day out!
Model: 393953
Size: 19x11.5x4cm

items.name_cn:
Black lambskin embroidered checkered pattern
CASSANDRE _Chain bag, a super practical mini bag. Italian imported original lambskin, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite handcrafted stitching with a square check pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. The shoulder strap is detachable. The bag features ten card slots, a bill compartment, two dividers, and a zippered interior pocket to hold everything!
Model: 743364
Dimensions: 23x14x3cm
Strap Length: 47cm

items.name_cn:
Black Large Monogram Clutch
No.: 2esca490yxl_h27e_tu
Product Info
This A5 clutch is an elegant and minimalist accessory. Crafted from beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the brand's classic pattern with a Dior logo on the front and grained calfskin trim. The zip compartment features a phone slip pocket and four card slots. Can be carried in hand or placed inside a handbag.
Beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric
Front with metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior with embossed Dior logo
Metal-plated brass zipper
Internal slip pocket
4 card slots
Size Info
Dimensions: 26.5x17.5 cm (LxH)
Fits A5 and US letter size documents # Fabric

items.name_cn:
Black Leather Small
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't you know about this yet? It's gone viral, sisters.
Dior has truly mastered the art of a relaxed vibe this year.
The new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
Hard to get, not less than the series, just kidding haha.
Casual yet high-end street style, changing from the usual sweet look.
The key is its multi-functional shoulder strap, all three ways look good.
Large leather pull tabs on both sides add personality, accented with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo.
Both decorative and practical.
Size: 25.5×14.5×14cm

items.name_cn:
Black Silver Clasp·
SOLFERINO BOX_19cm
A must-have hot seller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory fine toothpick grain Box cowhide, with excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, simply too fun!
Model: 634306
Size: 19x13x5cm

items.name_cn:
Black Size: 20 x 16 x 7.5 CM
A top-tier original factory item that luxury lovers keep repurchasing! The leather, hardware, and craftsmanship are full of authentication points! Not only is it fully original leather, but the hardware, stitching, hot stamping, and webbing are also made of the same materials and craftsmanship as the counter! High-definition, unfiltered real photos; what you see is exactly the texture you get! This Cluny mini handbag features a smooth resin LV logo for high recognition, and imported wavy calfskin is highly durable! A simple design paired with a high-density wide webbing strap, it is both formal and business-like yet retains a youthful vibe, a perfect bag that is elegant and casual!
